title: Smp Starter
description: SmpStarter is a simple plugin used to manage the start of an SMP
body:
# 🛠 SmpStarter Plugin

Make your Minecraft SMP server launches smooth and stress-free with SmpStarterxZ! Automatically handle world borders, grace periods, PvP phases, and countdowns so every player gets a fair and balanced start. Perfect for SMP server admins who want efficient, clean, and professional starts.

## 🌍 Core Features:

- Easily set the spawn border center with /sz set center
- Start your SMP with /sz start – initial border expands automatically
- PvP disabled during grace period, then enabled automatically
- Configurable countdown pop-ups and bossbar text
- Reset or reload SMP settings anytime using /sz reset & /sz reload

## # **⚙️ Highly Customizable:**

- Starting & final world border sizes
- Grace period duration & PvP timing
- Countdown display, prefix, and bossbar visibility
- Fully configurable to match your Minecraft SMP server style

## 🎮 Why Choose SmpStarterxZ?

- Fast and lightweight plugin for smooth SMP launches
- Improves player experience by automating server start routines
- Ideal for Minecraft SMP admins, server managers, and community servers
- Works perfectly with Paper, Spigot, and Bukkit servers

🔑 Optimized for SMP Server Management

SmpStarterxZ is your go-to plugin for automated SMP starts, grace period management, and PvP control, helping your server run professionally while keeping players engaged.
